questionHtml: Calculate the initial pH before any sodium hydroxide was added, using section 21 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
«Ka = 10–2.87 = 1.35 × 10–3 »

«1.35 × 10–3 = chloroethanoate×H+0.50 mol dm-3=x20.50 mol dm-3 »

«x = [H+] =1.4×10-3×0.50=» 2.6 × 10–2 «mol dm–3» ✔


«pH = –log[H+] = –log(2.6 × 10–2) =» 1.59 ✔

 

Accept final answer in range 1.58–1.60.

Award [2] for correct final answer.
